title: About Me
text:
Hello, my name is Sadman Hayat. I am currently pursuing a Master of Business Administration (MBA) at University Canada West in Vancouver, Canada.
I have a background in business development, financial coordination, and customer service, and I am particularly interested in investment management, financial analysis, and data-driven decision making.
My goal is to build a career in finance and investment management, where I can use analytical tools and financial insights to support strategic decision-making.
